ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "team_1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team_2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "full_time_score" TEXT /* Full-time score of the match */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Half-time score of the match */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_type" TEXT /* Type of venue (e.g., stadium, arena) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics belong to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team for which statistics are recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Total corners by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total fouls committed by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target by the team */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Shots off target by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to the engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, comment) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the engagement */,
  "engagement_value" INTEGER /* Value of the engagement (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship deal */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team involved in the sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the sponsorship deal */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., kit, stadium, media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match related to the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the comment */,
  "comment_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, admin, team manager) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of refereeing experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_referees" (
  "match_referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match-referee association */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the referee in the match (e.g., main referee, assistant referee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_referees_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being broadcast */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel broadcasting the match */,
  "broadcast_date" TEXT /* Date of the broadcast */,
  "broadcast_time" TEXT /* Time of the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_broadcasts_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team owning the social media profile */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the social media profile */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics for the social media profile (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the ticket is for */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the ticket */,
  "seat_type" TEXT /* Type of seat (e.g., VIP, standard) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchandise" (
  "merchandise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchandise item */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team selling the merchandise */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchandise product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of merchandise product (e.g., jersey, hat) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the merchandise product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchandise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merchandise_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team generating the revenue */,
  "revenue_type" TEXT /* Type of revenue (e.g., ticket sales, merchandise sales, sponsorships) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
